hero.title: LingaLink
hero.subtitle: An AI-powered coaching service that provides automated reviews in online lessons. Offering personalized learning experiences to support effective skill development.
hero.description: An online learning platform where AI supports the efficiency of learning and teaching

students.title: For Students
students.description: Focus on lessons, and AI will organize key points for you later

teachers.title: For Teachers
teachers.description: AI helps create educational materials from news and articles

ai.title: AI Support
ai.description: Revolutionary tools that streamline both learning and education

booking.title: Lesson Booking & Participation
booking.description1: Check your favorite teacher's schedule and book with one tap
booking.description2: Attend online classes with video calls and screen sharing

aiSummary.title: AI-Powered Auto Summary
aiSummary.description1: After lessons end, AI automatically summarizes the class content
aiSummary.description2: Auto-generated review summaries for efficient study

learningRecord.title: Learning Record Storage
learningRecord.description1: Access past lesson content, summaries, and reviews anytime
learningRecord.description2: Audio is automatically transcribed, so you never miss anything

collaboration.title: Collaboration Tools
collaboration.description1: Write and draw whiteboard-style during lessons
collaboration.description2: Students and teachers can operate simultaneously and save everything

schedule.title: Schedule Management
schedule.description: Register your available time slots for students to book

materialCreation.title: Original Material Creation (AI Support)
materialCreation.description1: Search news articles and convert them into teaching materials
materialCreation.description2: Summarize content and generate AI illustrations to create original materials instantly

materialManagement.title: Material Storage & Editing
materialManagement.description1: Manage created materials in a list, with editing and updating capabilities
materialManagement.description2: Set difficulty levels to match individual students

videoCall.title: High-Quality Video Calls
videoCall.description: Stable connections for video and audio communication

screenShare.title: Screen Sharing & Recording
screenShare.description: Share lessons with screen display and auto-save recordings

reminder.title: Review Reminders
reminder.description: Re-study later using summaries and reviews

cta.title: Start a New Learning Experience with LingaLink
cta.description: Experience efficient learning and teaching supported by AI
